name: Genius Sports Data API
what_it_does: Genius Sports REST API for official sports data, live betting feeds, and sports integrity monitoring. Enables AI agents to manage official live sports data collection from stadiums and venues for sportsbook and sports media applications, handle betting market and odds data for sports wagering platform integration, access player and team statistics for sports analytics and media applications, retrieve integrity monitoring and suspicious betting pattern detection for sports betting compliance, manage data licensing and distribution for official sports data resale, handle in-game and in-play betting data streams for live wagering applications, access American football (NFL) official tracking data for NFL analytics, retrieve cricket, esports, and global sports data for international sports platforms, manage media rights and sports content distribution, and integrate Genius Sports data with sportsbooks, media, and fantasy sports platforms.
use_cases: Powering live sportsbook data from betting platform agents
Monitoring betting integrity from sports regulatory agents
Delivering official NFL data from sports analytics agents
Supporting fantasy sports from DFS platform agents
not_for: Non-sports applications without sports data licensing
Consumer applications without proper sports data agreements
Organizations in unlicensed sports betting jurisdictions
best_when: A sportsbook, sports media company, or sports analytics platform using Genius Sports wants AI agents to automate live data feeds, betting market management, integrity monitoring, and sports content distribution.
avoid_when: SPORTS BETTING REGULATION: Genius Sports betting data requires state sports betting license for sportsbook applications; data for gambling operations in unlicensed jurisdictions violates state and federal law. NFL official data — Genius Sports is the NFL's official data partner (2021-2030 exclusive deal); use of NFL official tracking data outside license scope violates contract and NFL IP rights. Match-fixing and integrity — Genius Sports operates betting integrity monitoring for sports organizations; automated suspicious activity detection creates mandatory reporting obligations to sport governing bodies and gambling regulators.

auth.notes: Genius Sports uses API key and OAuth 2.0. Developer documentation at developer.geniussports.com. Push/webhook feeds for live data. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Founded 2001 (as Betgenius). Public (GENI NYSE). Genius Sports is the NFL's official data partner (exclusive 2021-2030). Also official partner to NCAA, English Premier League, FIBA. Competes with Sportradar and Stats Perform for official sports data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual data licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual data license fees; betting data has additional regulatory requirements
pricing.notes: London, UK. Founded 2001. Public (GENI NYSE). NFL official data partner (2021-2030 exclusive). NCAA, EPL, FIBA partner. Competes with Sportradar for official data.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; live feed rate varies by sport

known_agent_gotchas: SPORTS BETTING JURISDICTION RISK: Genius Sports betting data requires sportsbook license in each operating jurisdiction; automated betting data use in unlicensed US states creates state criminal and federal Wire Act exposure

NFL official data exclusivity — Genius Sports holds NFL's exclusive official data partnership (2021-2030); NFL official tracking data use outside license scope violates contract and NFL IP rights; Sportradar cannot provide official NFL data

Integrity monitoring reporting obligation — automated suspicious betting pattern detection creates mandatory reporting obligation to sport governing bodies and state gambling regulators; failure to report known suspicious activity creates regulatory liability

Live feed connection management — Genius Sports live data streams require persistent connection with heartbeat management; dropped feed during game creates data gap affecting live sportsbook operations

Cricket and global sports specifics — Genius Sports has deep cricket and international football data; cricket scoring conventions (innings, overs, wickets) require domain-specific data model understanding for automation
UK Gambling Commission compliance — UK-licensed sportsbook integrations must comply with UKGC technical standards for data quality and latency; automated integration must meet UKGC audit requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Sports data and integrity. SOC2, ISO27001. API key/OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Sports and betting data. Regulated use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Official sports data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Sports and betting data.
